payload.description:
## Summary
Add item-level UI in the evaluation task so operators can inspect the classification for individual misclassified items.

## Deliverables
- Show the per-item category, rationale, confidence, and supporting evidence in item detail views.
- Make it easy to move from the overall breakdown to the affected misclassification items.
- Keep item-level classification distinct from topic-level optimization RCA details.
payload.title: Add item-level drill-down UI for misclassification classifications
